Tell me what to do with the batch — generate, edit, filter, organize. e.g. "generate 4 dragon concept sketches", "find images that look like swords and make them glow blue".
Diversity 0.50

MARKUP
How markup works

Draw colored regions on your image. Then reference them in your prompt by color — the model will target exactly those areas.

Red — the area you want to change
"Replace what's in the red box with a mountain"
Blue — what to preserve
"Keep everything in blue exactly the same"
Green — focus on or highlight
"Enhance the detail in the green area"
Yellow — a second reference
"Match the yellow area's color palette"

Your original image is never changed. Marks are layered on at Generate time and cleared after. You can mark each slot independently.

🔞

Before you continue

You must be 18 years or older and follow any relevant laws in your region.

By continuing you acknowledge that you meet the age requirement and that you take responsibility for using this service in compliance with the laws that apply where you are.

Welcome — here's the recommended workflow

  1. Create — generate an image from a prompt
  2. Edit — refine it with precise edit prompts
  3. Camera — perfect the angle
⚠️

NSFW content detected

NSFW generation is permitted in Edit and Camera mode only, not in Create.

Note: The models are best for editing from source imagery — not for generation from pure scratch, though they can be used like this. If you would like to use the dedicated model that specializes in NSFW you will need to subscribe.

🔒
Batch & Agent are Pro features
Unlock the agent and batch tools to work on dozens of images at once with one prompt.
  • ✨
    Agent chat — orchestrate edits in plain English ("generate 4 cover variants", "make every armor red")
  • 🖼️
    Batch edits — apply one prompt to many images cheaply, in parallel
  • 🔬
    Consistency audit — LLM-grade every output so you only keep the good ones
  • 🏷️
    Caption for LoRA — auto-tag a whole set for training datasets
Camera, Edit, and Create still work without a subscription.
🧪
SDXL Studio is a Pro feature
Subscribe to unlock SDXL Studio — custom checkpoints, LoRAs, and full txt2img / img2img / inpaint control on a dedicated T4 GPU.
  • 🧬
    Custom checkpoints — bring any SDXL / Pony model straight from Civitai
  • 🎚️
    Stack up to 6 LoRAs — per-LoRA weights with live trigger-word chips
  • 🖌️
    img2img & inpaint — full denoise / strength control and region masking
  • ⚙️
    Full sampler controls — steps, CFG, seed, size & negative prompt
Camera, Edit, and Create still work without a subscription.
